title: Begin the requested test instead of postponing it

messages.text: Carter remained seated across from Will in the public diner.

pendingUserMessage: "Both good questions. So far as our tests have gone, I'm still transported to the intended destination. And The Doctor wasn't able to recreate the effect--but that's not saying one of you couldn't. We should test it," Will replied.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: Carter asks Will what happened when the Doctor tried. The Doctor gives a long explanation of his failed reproductions. O'Neill agrees to test the method, but postpones it until they are outside in the parking lot and have settled the check.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Respond to Will's answers by moving the present diner turn into the supported test discussion instead of asking him to repeat them or postponing the payoff.
requiredBeats: Carter or O'Neill directly engages how the team will begin or evaluate the proposed test now.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Ask Will to repeat what happened when the Doctor tried.
Postpone the test until the parking lot, after the check, or another later beat.
